basic_details.job_title: Punjab & Sind Bank Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 635 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Punjab & Sind Bank Apprentice Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 635 new vacancies across India. Candidates with Any Graduate Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 21-05-2026, and closes on 06-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Punjab & Sind Bank website, punjabandsind.bank.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Human Resource Development (HRD) Department, Punjab & Sind Bank
basic_details.application_mode: Online only (via NAPS portal + NATS portal + PSB website)

age_limit.age_details: The candidate must be proficient in the local language (Reading, Writing, Speaking & Understanding) of the applied State/UT and must produce 8th/10th/12th or Graduate level certificate evidencing having studied the local language.

qualification.education_qualification: Regular Graduation in any discipline from a recognized University/Institute or equivalent qualification recognized by the Central Government.

selection_process: Merit-based on HSC / 10+2 marks (State-wise, District-wise, Category-wise) + Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online through the Bank's website (https://punjabandsind.bank.in/) only. No other mode of application will be accepted. Before applying, candidates must mandatorily complete 100% registration on both the NAPS portal (https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in/) and the NATS portal (https://nats.education.gov.in/). Candidates must also note down their Enrollment ID generated on the NATS portal as it is required while applying.

basic_details.organization_name: National Council for Cement and Building Materials (NCB)

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 21 days from the date of publication in Employment News

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech / M.Sc. / PhD in relevant discipline with minimum 60% marks as per post requirement

selection_process: Screening + Trade/Skill Test / Written Examination / Personal Discussion
how_to_apply: Candidates should download the application form from the NCB website and send the duly filled application along with all required self-attested documents by post to the given address before the last date.
Last Date for Receipt of Applications: 21 days from the date of publication of the advertisement (first day of the week) of publication in the Employment News.

The candidates are requested to download application form (available at NCB website) and submit the same duly filled with recent passport size photograph (2 nos.) giving all details as mentioned in point no. 12 along with self-attested documents copies as mentioned this advertisement to The Director General, National Council for Cement and Building Materials, 34 KM Stone, Delhi Mathura Road, (NH-2), Ballabgarh, Haryana, 121004. Applications through email will not be accepted.
Application once made will not allowed to be withdrawn and fees once paid will neither be refunded nor can be held for any other recruitment or selection process.
seo_tags: National Council for Cement and Building Materials Office Assistant

basic_details.job_title: RITES Individual Consultants Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 35 Section Engineer, Geologist and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Rail India Technical and Economic Service (RITES) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 35 Individual Consultants. Candidates with B.Tech/B.E, Diploma Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 06-05-2026, and closes on 26-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through RITES website, rites.com/.
basic_details.application_mode: Online only via RITES career portal

age_limit.age_details: CVs of suitable candidates are sent to client; engagement letters issued only for candidates whose CVs are approved by client and subject to project/award requirements.

how_to_apply: Visit the RITES official website https://www.rites.com and open the “Career” section, then the relevant online registration link for Individual Consultant posts (VC Nos. YP/16/26–YP/38/26).
Carefully read the detailed advertisement and ensure that you meet the required educational qualification, post-qualification experience and age criteria for the specific VC number/post.

Fill the online application (registration format) with accurate personal details, educational qualifications, experience, category and identity proof details; note and preserve the system-generated Registration No. for all future communication.

Upload scanned copies of required documents: photograph, High School certificate (DOB), all marksheets and degree/diploma certificates (X, XII, Diploma, Graduation, Post-Graduation, PhD), experience certificates, relieving/NOC for Govt./PSU employees, ID proofs (Aadhaar, PAN, Passport/Voter ID/Driving Licence), and any additional supporting documents, in clear, legible format.
Print and sign the submitted online Application Form containing Registration No.; keep it ready along with self-attested photocopies for document verification/interview.
At the time of document verification/interview (in-person or online), present all original documents along with one self-attested set and duly filled Annexure-A (document checklist).
Note that applications once submitted cannot be altered; candidates must ensure correctness and completeness before final submission.
RITES Individual Consultant Application Form
